title: christisonia keralensis
intro: Christisonia keralensis, also known as the Indian spurge or Christ's spurge, is a medicinal plant species native to the Western Ghats of India. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Christisonia keralensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
